memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Hugh de Mortimer (1100-1180)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Hugh de Mortimer (c.1100 – 26 February 1180/81) was a Norman English medieval lord.
 
Lineage

The son of Ranulph de Mortimer, he was Lord of Wigmore Castle, Stratfield Mortimer, Cleobury Mortimer and …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Mortimer於1117年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫時，他的父親Hugh de Mortimer30歲，母親Maude Longespic21歲。他和Maud de Meschines至少有4個兒子。他去世於1181年2月26日享年64歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Mortimer was born in 1117, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Mortimer, was 30 and his mother, Maude Longespic, was 21. He had at least 4 sons with Maud de Meschines. He died on 26 February 1181, at the age of 64, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Mortimer est né en 1117, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Mortimer, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maude Longespic, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Maud de Meschines. Il est décédé le 26 février 1181, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Mortimerが1117年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Hugh de Mortimerは30歳，母Maude Longespicは21歳であった。彼はMaud de Meschinesとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1181年2月26日に64歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Mortimer(이)가 1117년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Mortimer(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude Longespic(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Maud de Meschines(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1181년 2월 26일 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Mortimer родился в 1117 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Mortimer было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Longespic, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Maud de Meschines. Он умер 26 февраля 1181 г. в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.
